articles.title: Actor Nathan Chasing Horse sentenced to life in prison for sexual assault - PBS
articles.description: A Nevada judge sentenced “Dances With Wolves” actor Nathan Chasing Horse on Monday to life in prison for sexually assaulting Indigenous women and girls. A jury had previously convicted him of 13 charges, mostly related to sexual assault of three women.

articles.title: Lisa Kudrow Says Friends Writers Would Discuss ‘Sexual Fantasies’ About the Cast - Vulture
articles.description: Lisa Kudrow shares that some of the writers of ‘Friends’ would be ‘up late discussing their sexual fantasies about Jennifer and Courteney. It was intense.”’

articles.title: 'Stranger Things: Tales from ‘85' Renewed for Season 2: Interview - The Hollywood Reporter
